title: Fig.S1
author: Strnad Trček, Irena
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the supplemental materials accompanying the manuscript: 
  “Stochastic Modeling of Motorway Work-Zone Capacity from Field Data in Slovenia”  by Luka Trček and Irena Strnad Trček, submitted to the  Journal of Transportation Engineering, Part A: Systems (ASCE) . 
 The repository includes  Fig. S1  – Illustration of the queue-length calculation procedure used in the practical application example presented in the paper. 
 The supplemental materials are intended to clarify the calculation steps used in the example queue prediction under known demand.
